rationale: Educ. Code §35.007 grants the commissioner rulemaking authority for Chapter 35 (literacy). A homestead exemption change under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated and does not affect this authority.
quote: The commissioner may adopt rules as necessary to administer this chapter.
_note: No overlap between proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) change and Educ. Code §35.007 rulemaking authority.
